citation: Kramida, A., Ralchenko, Yu., Reader, J., and NIST ASD Team. NIST Atomic Spectra Database (ver. 5.12), https://physics.nist.gov/asd
note: Strong persistent Na I lines from the ASD Lines query (observed air wavelengths, 200-2000 nm, Aki-ranked). Sodium is a one-valence-electron (alkali) atom, the canonical GSZ showcase; the resonance D doublet (588.995/589.592 nm, 3p->3s) is unresolved by the model's single 3p orbital and both map onto the one computed 3p->3s transition. Compared at the disclosed 5% tolerance.
